Lab Guide › Working in the Lab

Ship packages

How to request a shipping label and send a package through AggieShip.

  • Start guide: Undergraduates
  • Start guide: Graduate students
  • Start guide: Postdocs

Shipping labels for the lab are created through AggieShip. Labels can be made by the MAE Front Office or Christina.

1. Gather the required information

  • Package dimensions (L × W × H) and weight
  • Declared value of the item
  • Type of packaging (box, padded envelope, tube, manufacturer packaging)
  • Manufacturer address, including email and phone number
  • Account to charge shipping to
  • Delivery speed needed (ground, 2-day, overnight)

2. Request the label

Send the information above to the MAE Front Office or Christina; they’ll generate the label in AggieShip and provide it to you.

3. Print and attach the label

Print the label and securely attach it to the package, taping all edges so it won’t peel.

4. Drop off the package

Take it to the courier drop-off location (most often FedEx). If you’re in a rush and pay out of pocket, follow the Pay for things reimbursement process.

Always get Christina’s permission before paying out of pocket for anything.
